markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team that scores the most points during the specified half. Only points scored during the specified half of play count towards this market. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks).

markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team that scores the most points during the specified half. Only points scored during the specified half of play count towards this market. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks).
